basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Scientist, Project Attendant and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Design Innovation Fellow / Sr. Project Scientist / Project Attendant
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Design Innovation Fellow, Sr. Project Scientist & Project Attendant Notification 2026 has been released on 29 June 2026 on the official website home.iitd.ac.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IIT Delhi Design Innovation Fellow, Sr. Project Scientist & Project Attendant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: No specific age limit mentioned. Age Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

qualification.details: Design Innovation Fellow: First-class B.Tech. or B.E in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or Mechanical Engineering. Strong python skills. Experience in mobile application development. Experience in development of embedded systems with Arduino and Raspberry Pi. Experience in interfacing various sensors with Arduino. Sr. Project Scientist: First class M. Des or equivalent in the appropriate discipline OR First class B. Des with 3 years of experience. Hands on experience in the design and development of Assistive Solutions for persons with visual impairment. Strong skills in CAD modelling, 3D printing and prototyping techniques. Experience in design and execution of user studies. Open to travel to multiple locations for the user trials. Project Attendant: 12th class (10+2) passed & Minimum six months of work experience in a Research Institution or Government/Autonomous Higher Education Institution. Experience in computer applications installation, OS installation and overall maintenance. Experience in use of mobile applications for persons with visual impairment. Experience in using high-speed scanners and OCR tools.

salary_details.details: Design Innovation Fellow: Rs.35,000/-p.m. plus HRA @27% Sr. Project Scientist: Rs.75,000-82,500-90,750-99,825-1,09,807/- p.m. (Consolidated) Project Attendant: Rs.15,800-17,380-19,118-21,030-23,133/-p.m. (Consolidated)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Design Innovation Fellow: First-class B.Tech. or B.E in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or Mechanical Engineering. Strong python skills. Experience in mobile application development. Experience in development of embedded systems with Arduino and Raspberry Pi. Experience in interfacing various sensors with Arduino. Sr. Project Scientist: First class M. Des or equivalent in the appropriate discipline OR First class B. Des with 3 years of experience. Hands on experience in the design and development of Assistive Solutions for persons with visual impairment. Strong skills in CAD modelling, 3D printing and prototyping techniques. Experience in design and execution of user studies. Open to travel to multiple locations for the user trials. Project Attendant: 12th class (10+2) passed & Minimum six months of work experience in a Research Institution or Government/Autonomous Higher Education Institution. Experience in computer applications installation, OS installation and overall maintenance. Experience in use of mobile applications for persons with visual impairment. Experience in using high-speed scanners and OCR tools.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: All Posts: No specific age limit mentioned. Age Relaxation: 5% relaxation of marks may be granted to the SC/ST Candidates.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Design Innovation Fellow: Rs.35,000/-p.m. plus HRA @27% Sr. Project Scientist: Rs.75,000-82,500-90,750-99,825-1,09,807/- p.m. (Consolidated) Project Attendant: Rs.15,800-17,380-19,118-21,030-23,133/-p.m. (Consolidated)

rows.event: Last Date for submitting applications by email

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting applications via email for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 is 14th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies announced for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of Design Innovation Fellow, Sr. Project Scientist, and Project Attendant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to prepare their application and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Attendant post?
faq.answer: For the Project Attendant post, candidates must have passed the 12th class (10+2) and possess a minimum of six months of work experience in a Research Institution or Government/Autonomous Higher Education Institution.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Sr. Project Scientist position is consolidated and ranges from Rs.75,000 to Rs.1,09,807/- per month, depending on experience and qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 involves short-listing of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Delhi apply for these positions?
faq.answer: The notification specifies the location as Delhi. While not explicitly stated that only Delhi residents can apply, candidates should be prepared to work in New Delhi. Further details on relocation or remote work are not provided.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
